zh.Holton St. Mary, Suffolk, England: 英國英格蘭素福爾可霍爾頓 聖 瑪麗
zh.Holbrook, Suffolk, England, United Kingd: 英國英格蘭素福爾可霍爾布魯克
zh.Holton St Mary, Suffolk, England, United: 英國英格蘭素福爾可霍爾頓 聖 瑪麗
zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Holbrook於大約1350年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可霍爾頓 聖 瑪麗時，他的父親John de Holbrook32歲，母親Maud Bourchier32歲。他於1375年與Maud Agnes Burchid在英國英格蘭素福爾可霍爾頓 聖 瑪麗結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他於1380年在英國英格蘭素福爾可霍爾頓 聖 瑪麗被列為scholar and author。他去世於大約1440年在他的家鄉享年92歲。

zh-hans.Holton St Mary, Suffolk, England, United: 英国英格兰素福爾可霍爾頓 聖 瑪麗
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Holbrook于大约1350年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可霍爾頓 聖 瑪麗时，他的父亲John de Holbrook32岁，母亲Maud Bourchier32岁。他于1375年与Maud Agnes Burchid在英国英格兰素福爾可霍爾頓 聖 瑪麗结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他于1380年在英国英格兰素福爾可霍爾頓 聖 瑪麗被列为scholar and author。他去世于大约1440年在他的家乡享年92岁。

nameMeanings.name: Holbrook
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called with Old English hol ‘hole, hollow’ + brōc ‘brook, stream’, such as Holbrook (Derbyshire, Dorset, Suffolk) and Howbrook in Wortley (Yorkshire).
Americanized form of North German Halbrock (or some like-sounding surname), a cognate of 1 above.

History: This name was first taken to America by the brothers Thomas and John Holbrook, who emigrated to MA in the 17th century; their line can be traced back to Dundry, Somerset, England, in the first half of the 16th century. Other English bearers who started early lines of descent in the New World are Joseph Ho(u)lbrook of Warrington, Lancashire, who emigrated to MD as an indentured servant in the later 17th century; Randolph Holbrook, who was in VA in the 1720s but later returned to Nantwich, Cheshire; and Rev. John Holbrook, who emigrated from Handbury, Staffordshire, to NJ c. 1723.

variants.name: Holbrooks
meanings: English (Lancashire): variant of Holbrook , with excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Haulbrook
meanings: Altered form of English   Holbrook  , reflecting the southern US pronunciation of the name.

variants.name: Halbrook
meanings: English: variant of   Holbrook  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Holbrook was born about 1350, in Holton St Mary, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, John de Holbrook, was 32 and his mother, Maud Bourchier, was 32. He married Maud Agnes Burchid in 1375, in Holton St Mary, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. In 1380, his occupation is listed as scholar and author in Holton St Mary, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. He died about 1440, in his hometown, at the age of 92.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Holbrook est né environ 1350, à Holton St Mary, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Holbrook, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Maud Bourchier, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Maud Agnes Burchid en 1375, à Holton St Mary, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. En 1380, sa profession de son indiquée est scholar and author à Holton St Mary, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé environ 1440, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 92 ans.

Er hat 1375 in Holton St Mary, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Maud Agnes Burchid geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. 1380 ist sein Beruf als scholar and author in Holton St Mary, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb um 1440 im Alter von 92 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Holbrookが約1350年にイギリスイギリススフォルクホルトン スト マリーで生まれた時，父John de Holbrookは32歳，母Maud Bourchierは32歳であった。1375年にイギリスイギリススフォルクホルトン スト マリーでMaud Agnes Burchidと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。1380年，イギリスイギリススフォルクホルトン スト マリーでの職業はscholar and authorと記録されている。彼は約1440年に故郷で92歳で死去した。

ko.Holton St. Mary, Suffolk, England: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 홀턴 스트 메리
ko.Holton St Mary, Suffolk, England, United: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 홀턴 스트 메리
ko.lifeSummary: John de Holbrook(이)가 대략 1350년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 홀턴 스트 메리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Holbrook(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud Bourchier(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1375년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 홀턴 스트 메리에서 Maud Agnes Burchid(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 1380년, 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 홀턴 스트 메리에서 scholar and author이었다. 그는 대략 1440년 그의 고향에서 92세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Holbrook nasceu aproximadamente 1350, em Holton St Mary, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John de Holbrook, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Maud Bourchier, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud Agnes Burchid em 1375, em Holton St Mary, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Em 1380, sua profissão aparece como scholar and author em Holton St Mary, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1440, em sua cidade natal, com 92 anos.

ru.Holton St Mary, Suffolk, England, United: холтон ст мэри, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Holbrook родился около 1350 г. в местности холтон ст мэри, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John de Holbrook было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Maud Bourchier, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud Agnes Burchid в 1375 г. в местности холтон ст мэри, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. В 1380 году он работал по профессии scholar and author в местности холтон ст мэри, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер около 1440 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 92 лет.
